case_title: HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR VS. ROSALIA CARTAGENA et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR MORTGAGE PASS THROUGH CERTIFICATES SERIES 2007-1 AS TO DEFENDANT CARTAGENA, ROSALIA DOES 1 THRU 20, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR MORTGAGE PASS THROUGH CERTIFICATES SERIES 2007-1 SERVED OCT-05-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 20, INCL.
